response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in software craftsmanship, but lacks formal leadership experience in IT consulting or team management, has no evidence of UML or architecture design documentation, and his German is only basic — a critical gap given the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact in GIS and developer tooling
Proven track record at top tech firms (Google, Meta) with full-stack and systems-level expertise
Strong communication and mentoring experience through workshops, talks, and training initiatives
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level
No demonstrated experience in IT consulting, client advisory, or formal project leadership roles
Lack of evidence in UML, architectural modeling, or requirements management as explicitly required
